 {"id":"bd-tbz3","title":"bd init UX Improvements","description":"bd init leaves users with incomplete setup, requiring manual bd doctor --fix. Issues found: (1) git hooks not installed if user declines prompt, (2) no auto-migration when CLI is upgraded, (3) stale merge driver configs from old versions. Fix by making bd init more robust with better defaults and auto-migration.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2025-11-21T23:16:00.333543-08:00","updated_at":"2025-12-23T04:20:51.88847-08:00","closed_at":"2025-12-23T04:20:51.88847-08:00","close_reason":"Already implemented in commits ec4117d0 and 3a36d0b9 - hooks/merge driver install by default, doctor runs at end of init"}
 {"id":"bd-tggf","title":"Code Health Review Dec 2025: Technical Debt Cleanup","description":"Epic grouping technical debt identified in the Dec 16, 2025 code health review.

## Overall Health Grade: B (Solid foundation, needs cleanup)

### P1 (High Priority):
- bd-74w1: Consolidate duplicate path-finding utilities
- bd-b6xo: Remove/fix ClearDirtyIssues() race condition
- bd-b3og: Fix TestImportBugIntegration deadlock

### P2 (Medium Priority):
- bd-05a8: Split large files (doctor.go, sync.go)
- bd-qioh: Standardize error handling patterns
- bd-rgyd: Split queries.go (1586 lines)
- bd-9g1z: Fix/remove TestFindJSONLPathDefault

### P3 (Low Priority):
- bd-ork0: Add comments to 30+ ignored errors
- bd-4nqq: Remove dead test code in info_test.go
- bd-dhza: Reduce global state in main.go

## Key Areas:
1. Code duplication in path utilities
2. Large monolithic files (5 files >1000 lines)
3. Global state (25+ variables, 3 deprecated)
4. Silent error suppression (30+ instances)
5. Test gaps and dead test code
6. Atomicity risks in batch operations","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2025-12-16T18:18:58.115507-08:00","updated_at":"2025-12-16T18:21:50.561709-08:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-tggf","depends_on_id":"bd-74w1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-22T21:00:21.429274-08:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"bd-tggf","depends_on_id":"bd-05a8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-22T21:00:21.501589-08:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"bd-tggf","depends_on_id":"bd-9g1z","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-22T21:00:21.571116-08:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"bd-tggf","depends_on_id":"bd-qioh","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-22T21:00:21.640589-08:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"bd-tggf","depends_on_id":"bd-rgyd","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-22T21:00:21.710912-08:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"bd-tggf","depends_on_id":"bd-4nqq","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-22T21:00:21.781914-08:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"bd-tggf","depends_on_id":"bd-dhza","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-22T21:00:21.852-08:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"bd-tggf","depends_on_id":"bd-ork0","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-22T21:00:21.930168-08:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
-{"id":"bd-thgk","title":"Improve test coverage for internal/compact (18.2% → 70%)","description":"Improve test coverage for internal/compact package from 17% to 70%.

## Current State
- Coverage: 17.3%
- Files: compactor.go, git.go, haiku.go
- Tests: compactor_test.go (minimal tests)

## Functions Needing Tests

### compactor.go (core compaction)
- [ ] New - needs config validation tests
- [ ] CompactTier1 - needs single issue compaction tests
- [ ] CompactTier1Batch - needs batch processing tests
- [ ] compactSingleWithResult - internal, test via public API

### git.go
- [ ] GetCurrentCommitHash - needs git repo fixture tests

### haiku.go (AI summarization) - MOCK REQUIRED
- [ ] NewHaikuClient - needs API key validation tests
- [ ] SummarizeTier1 - needs mock API response tests
- [ ] callWithRetry - needs retry logic tests
- [ ] isRetryable - needs error classification tests
- [ ] renderTier1Prompt - needs template rendering tests

## Implementation Guide

1. **Mock the Anthropic API:**
   ```go
   // Create mock HTTP server
   server := httptest.NewServer(http.HandlerFunc(func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
       json.NewEncoder(w).Encode(map[string]interface{}{
           "content": []map[string]string{{"text": "Summarized content"}},
       })
   }))
   defer server.Close()
   
   // Point client at mock
   client.baseURL = server.URL
   ```

2. **Test scenarios:**
   - Successful compaction with AI summary
   - API failure with retry
   - Rate limit handling
   - Empty issue handling
   - Large issue truncation

3. **Use test database:**
   ```go
   store, cleanup := testutil.NewTestStore(t)
   defer cleanup()
   ```

## Success Criteria
- Coverage ≥ 70%
- AI calls properly mocked (no real API calls in tests)
- Retry logic verified
- Error paths covered

## Run Tests
```bash
go test -v -cover ./internal/compact
go test -race ./internal/compact
```","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-13T20:42:58.455767-08:00","updated_at":"2025-12-23T12:32:02.066107-08:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-thgk","depends_on_id":"bd-iz5t","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-12-23T12:44:07.287377-08:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}

 {"id":"bd-tm2p","title":"Polecats get stuck on interactive shell prompts (cp/mv/rm -i)","description":"During swarm operations, polecats frequently get stuck waiting for interactive prompts from shell commands like:
- cp prompting 'overwrite file? (y/n)'
- mv prompting 'overwrite file? (y/n)'  
- rm prompting 'remove file?'

This happens because macOS aliases or shell configs may have -i flags set by default.

Root cause: Claude Code runs commands that trigger interactive confirmation prompts, but cannot respond to them, causing the agent to hang indefinitely.

Observed in: Multiple polecats during GH issues swarm (Dec 2024)
- Derrick, Roustabout, Prospector, Warboy all got stuck on y/n prompts

Suggested fixes:
1. AGENTS.md should instruct agents to always use -f flag with cp/mv/rm
2. Polecat startup could set shell aliases to use non-interactive versions
3. bd prime hook could include guidance about non-interactive commands
4. Consider detecting stuck prompts and auto-recovering","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2025-12-14T16:51:24.572271-08:00","updated_at":"2025-12-17T23:13:40.536312-08:00","closed_at":"2025-12-17T19:13:04.074424-08:00"}
